importExport.importDesc: Upload CSV files to create or update products
importExport.productImportDesc: Upload a CSV with product data. Required columns: Name, Price. Optional: SKU, Barcode, Quantity, Status, Vendor, Tags, Categories, Weight, etc.
importExport.matchNote: Products matched by SKU or slug — existing products will be updated, new ones created.

tips.tip1: Start by exporting your current products to see the expected format.
tips.tip2: Use semicolons (;) to separate multiple values in Tags and Categories columns.
tips.tip3: Products are matched by SKU first, then by slug (generated from name). Existing products are updated in place.
tips.tip4: Categories are automatically created if they don't exist.
tips.tip5: Maximum recommended import size: 1,000 rows per file.

taxes.title: Tax Settings
taxes.subtitle: Configure tax rates and VAT for your store
taxes.vatConfigDesc: Saudi Arabia requires 15% VAT on most goods (ZATCA regulations)
taxes.pricesIncludeTaxHelp: If enabled, product prices are treated as tax-inclusive
taxes.taxExemptionsDesc: Individual customers can be marked as tax-exempt from the customer detail page
taxes.taxExemptionsInfo: Products can be individually marked as non-taxable in the product editor. Tax-exempt customers will not be charged VAT regardless of product settings.
taxes.zatcaDesc: Configure ZATCA Phase 2 compliance for Saudi e-invoicing (Fatoora). When enabled, invoices are reported to ZATCA automatically.
taxes.enableZatcaHelp: Generate ZATCA-compliant QR codes and report invoices to ZATCA
taxes.commercialRegHelp: CR number from the Ministry of Commerce
taxes.zatcaApiHelp: Connect to the ZATCA Fatoora platform for automatic invoice reporting
taxes.envHelp: Start with Sandbox for testing, then move to Production after verification
taxes.step1Desc: Submit your CSR (Certificate Signing Request) and OTP from ZATCA to receive a compliance certificate.
taxes.step2Desc: Submit a test invoice to verify your setup is compliant with ZATCA requirements.
taxes.step3Desc: Exchange your compliance certificate for a production certificate to start reporting real invoices.

toasts.completeStep1: Complete Step 1 first to get the Compliance Request ID
toasts.productionCsidObtained: Production CSID obtained — ZATCA integration active!
